title: Fifth caucus underway within first three hours of Council
description: GEORGE NEWS - Caucus upon caucus keep...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Caucus upon caucus keep delaying the inauguration of the new mayor of George. Council will only resume after 13:00 after Speaker Sean Snyman granted the fifth 30-minute caucus during the Special Council Meeting.


> It is within a political party's right to ask for a caucus of 30 minutes, but the frequency of the current requests is extreme.


Hopefully, George will know within the next hour who their next mayor will be.

DA councillors Justin Fry and Brendon Adams stop for a photo moment. In the background sits Councillor Iona Kritzinger, also of the DA. Photo: Michelle Pienaar

Previous article:

- New councillors inaugurated
- All eyes on today's Special Council Meeting with inauguration of new mayor

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
